prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约7161→7161→7359→8230→9859，近3年持续后移，2024至2025年大幅后移约1629名，下降趋势明显；2025年基准约9859名；本省物理类计划2024年43人、2025年43人，2026年计划仍为43人，招生规模持平，未对竞争产生直接缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北大学秦皇岛分校 为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科主榜东北大学2026年排名约第38名，学校层次高，对考生吸引力持续较强；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉 及校区认知争议；抖音热度总排名第82位，评价为一般，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录，报考心理平稳；依托东北大学学科体系，控制科学与工程A+、计算 机科学与技术A、软件工程A-、机械工程A-、材料科学与工程A-等，与招生专业中的自动化类、计算机类、机械类等高度对应，优势学科对相关专业报考有支撑作用。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 学校位于河北秦皇岛，非本省高校，但 作为985分校在甘肃有一定招生规模（物理类43人），跨省报考热度平稳；计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度高热推荐，持续吸引高分考生；本省2026年普通高考总人数约21.87万，较2025年物理类12.14万大 幅增长约21.6%，竞争显著加剧；省控线物理类本科批2024年370分、2025年374分，略有上升，反映整体竞争环境趋紧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、本省考生大幅增加及热门专业持 续高热等因素，预计2026年物理类竞争进一步加剧，位次在2025年9859名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约9959名，区间9459–10459名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术

- 电子信息工程/通信工程/物联网工程。

- 数学类（数学与应用数学、应用统计学、数据科学与大数据技术）
- 机械类（机械工程、车辆工程）/机械电子工程
- 仪器类（测控技术与仪器、光电信息科学与工程）/智能感知工程

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 7161 → 7161 → 7359 → 8230 → 9859, with a continuous backward shift in the last 3 years, and a significant backward shift of about 1629 places from 2024 to 2025, showing a clear downward trend; the baseline for 2025 is about 9859; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 43 in 2024, 43 in 2025, and remains 43 for 2026, with a stable enrollment scale, which did not directly alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University at Qinhuangdao is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking, Northeastern University ranks about 38th in 2026. The university level is high, maintaining strong attraction for candidates; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus recognition disputes; Douyin popularity ranks 82nd overall, rated as average, with no obvious negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps, indicating stable application psychology; relying on Northeastern University's discipline system, with Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Software Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, etc., which highly correspond to the enrollment majors such as Automation, Computer Science, Mechanical Engineering, etc., supporting the application for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university is located in Qinhuangdao, Hebei, not a local university, but as a 985 branch, it has a certain enrollment scale in Gansu (43 in Physics Category), with stable cross-provincial application popularity; majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly popular and recommended, continuously attracting high-scoring candidates; the total number of candidates for the 2026 provincial general college entrance examination is about 218,700, a significant increase of about 21.6% compared to the 2025 Physics Category of 121,400, sharply intensifying competition; the provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch was 370 in 2024 and 374 in 2025, a slight increase, reflecting a tightening overall competitive environment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift trend of historical rankings, the stable enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase in provincial candidates, and the sustained high popularity of hot majors, it is expected that competition in the Physics Category will further intensify in 2026, with the ranking continuing to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 9859; the predicted minimum ranking is about 9959, with a range of 9459–10459.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Automation (Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation)
- Electronic Information Engineering/Communication Engineering/Internet of Things Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Applied Statistics, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Mechanical Engineering (Mechanical Engineering, Vehicle Engineering)/Mechatronic Engineering
- Instrumentation (Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering)/Intelligent Perception Engineering
- Additive Manufacturing Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials (Material Forming and Control Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Metallurgical Engineering, etc.)
- Economics (Economics, Finance, International Economics and Trade)
- Business Administration (Business Administration, Accounting, Health Service and Management)/Information Management and Information Systems.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 9459–10459, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Mathematics, Mechanical Engineering, Instrumentation) as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Automation, Electronic Information) as a sprint; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 9400), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (above 10400), use Tier 3 majors as a safety net.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 2238 → 1652 → 1655 → 1569, showing an overall upward trend, stabilizing in the 1569–1655 range in recent three years; the baseline for 2025 is about 1569th place; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 10 in 2024, 10 in 2025, and increased to 11 in 2026, a slight expansion of 10%, which slightly alleviates competition but has limited impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University at Qinhuangdao is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking, Northeastern University ranks approximately 38th in 2026, with a high level, still strongly attractive to liberal arts candidates; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed; Douyin popularity is average; no record of application cutoff gaps, indicating stable application psychology; relying on the disciplinary system of Northeastern University, but the History Category enrollment majors (Economics, Business Administration, Foreign Languages and Literature, Ethnology) have low correlation with Northeastern University's A+ disciplines (e.g., Control Science and Engineering), so the disciplinary advantage provides limited support for History Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of candidates for the provincial general college entrance examination is approximately 218,700, a significant increase of about 21.8% compared to 58,400 History Category candidates in 2025, intensifying competition; the provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch was 421 points in 2024 and 412 points in 2025, a slight decrease, reflecting a slight easing of the overall competitive environment. The university is located in Qinhuangdao, Hebei, with a small History Category enrollment scale (10–11 students), and cross-provincial application popularity remains stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the upward trend in historical rankings, the slight expansion in 2026, and the significant increase in provincial candidates, the expansion and candidate growth offset each other. It is expected that the History Category ranking in 2026 will slightly decline from the 2025 baseline of 1569; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1683, with a range of 1183–2183.
